name: GlobaLinks
message: GlobaLinks Hacked This is Handala. I do not forget. I do not forgive. And I do not look away. Today, GlobaLinks, a giant in concrete and quiet deals, has been breached. Its foundations have cracked , not under an earthquake, but under truth. Blueprints. Contracts. Internal emails. Private investor files. Resident records. All of it…
